data.title: Kevin O'Leary advises Trump to protect American Dream, not pick sectors. Capitalism is best system; less gov't is better. U.S. top for entrepreneurship with number one export being American dream.
data.description: Investor Kevin O'Leary recently advised President Donald Trump to prioritize safeguarding the American dream over focusing on specific industries. O'Leary emphasized the effectiveness of capitalism despite its imperfections, advocating for minimal government intervention in the economy. In a video shared on social media, O'Leary highlighted that U.S. presidents should nurture the nation's entrepreneurial spirit rather than favoring particular sectors. He stressed that the U.S. economy's success over the past two centuries signifies competence in decision-making. O'Leary emphasized that the U.S. is a leading hub for entrepreneurship globally, with the American dream being its principal export. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: New coaching program by Transformation Unlimited helps ambitious Millennials overcome burnout; 76% experience it at work.
data.description: In Jupiter Island, Florida on October 17, 2025, a rising issue for ambitious Millennial professionals is burnout, mental clutter, and life chaos. A study by Gallup reveals that a staggering 76% of Millennials experience burnout at their workplace, and close to half of them report facing it on a frequent basis. This concerning trend has prompted initiatives to support these individuals in managing these challenges.

data.title: BTC's RSI falls to April low as Coinbase Premium weakens, hinting at potential recovery ahead.
data.description: The Bitcoin Coinbase Premium Index has recently shifted to a negative value, coinciding with Bitcoin's Relative Strength Index (RSI) dropping to its lowest point since April. This development suggests a potential slow recovery phase for BTC in the near future.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury firms experienced NAV premiums collapse, creating a rare opportunity for skilled asset managers to enter the market. Retail investors lost billions in the process.
data.description: Researchers have found that Bitcoin treasury firms experienced a significant decline in Net Asset Value premiums as retail investors lost billions. Despite this, the reset in values has led to new opportunities for skilled asset managers to enter the market. This transition has potential for growth and innovation within the industry.

data.title: Data breach at PeopleGuru, Inc. under investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP for unauthorized access to sensitive info.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP announced its investigation of a data breach that resulted in unauthorized entry to the personal information of individuals associated with PeopleGuru, Inc., a Florida software company. The breach has impacted a significant number of individuals, potentially exposing their sensitive data. The breach is being thoroughly examined to determine the extent of the breach and assess the impact on those affected.

data.title: Sucheta Kamath, CEO of ExQ, launches Executive Function Advocacy Toolkit to promote teaching EF skills, improving student preparedness.
data.description: CEO & Founder of ExQ, Sucheta Kamath, recently announced the launch of the Executive Function Advocacy Toolkit in Atlanta on October 17, 2025. The toolkit aims to increase awareness about the importance of teaching Executive Function skills, which are crucial cognitive and affective skills for students. This initiative seeks to highlight the significance of these skills in preparing students for future success.

data.title: Westhaven Gold Corp. announces departure of VP Sean Thompson. TSX-V:WHN. Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 17, 2025, Westhaven Gold Corp. (TSX-V:WHN) made a public statement regarding the exit of Sean Thompson, the Vice President of Corporate Development & Investor Relations from the organization.

data.title: Alliant Insurance Services grows transportation risk expertise in Texas with acquisition and key hires.
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, has revealed its plans for growth in the transportation sector across the United States. Alliant recently made a strategic acquisition and brought in new senior-level staff members to bolster its existing platform. This move is part of the company's efforts to strengthen its presence in the transportation industry and capitalize on emerging opportunities.

data.title: Regional banks facing strain and plummeting stocks as Bitcoin drops to four-month low amidst banking sector worries post-2023 crisis reforms - CEO warns.
data.description: Despite the crisis reforms implemented in 2023, regional banks found themselves under increased pressure as the stocks of Zions and Western Alliance plunged. Concurrently, Bitcoin experienced a significant drop, falling to its lowest value in four months. This event underscores the ongoing fragility in the financial sector, with Zions and Western Alliance stocks experiencing a notable decline alongside the cryptocurrency market.
Ukraine President Zelenskiy: Can Stop War With Trump's Help - Met With American Energy Companies Yesterday That Are Ready To Help Us

data.title: Former Louisiana Attorney General initiates investigation into Luminar Technologies, Inc. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Oct 17, 2025. #LAZR
data.description: A former Louisiana Attorney General, Charles C. Foti, Jr., now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, has begun investigating Luminar Technologies, Inc. The investigation is aimed at exploring potential legal concerns within the company. This news was disclosed in New York and New Orleans on October 17, 2025.

data.title: U-Haul offers 30 days free storage in Alaska after Typhoon Halong displaces 1,500 residents along western coast.eof
data.description: U-Haul® Company of Alaska is offering 30 days of complimentary self-storage and U-Box® container services at its 11 facilities statewide to assist those affected by Typhoon Halong. The typhoon devastated Native communities on Alaska's western coast, leaving over 1,500 residents homeless. Hurricane-force winds and storm surges caused widespread destruction last weekend. This initiative aims to support displaced individuals during this challenging time.

data.title: Former Louisiana Attorney General leads Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC in an investigation of officers and directors of Hasbro, Inc (NASDAQ: HAS) on October 26, 2023.
data.description: In a press release dated October 17, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., the former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), revealed KSF's initiation of an inquiry into Hasbro, Inc. (NasdaqGS: HAS). The investigation, which began on October 26, 2023, focuses on undisclosed matters connected to Hasbro, Inc.

data.title: Light & Wonder, Inc. updates Nevada legal proceedings - Aristocrat granted discovery of math models for games released since 2021.
data.description: Light & Wonder, Inc. (LNW) has given an update on the recent ruling from the Nevada Court in the legal dispute with Aristocrat. The court has granted Aristocrat's request for discovering math models related to specific Light & Wonder hold and spin games launched after 2021, when Emma Charles became part of the company. Previously, the court had rejected a request from Aristocrat. Light & Wonder is traded on NASDAQ and ASX under the ticker symbol LNW.

data.title: Judge extends injunction on layoffs as Trump pushes for more budget cuts; agencies consider possibility of layoffs.
data.description: Some officials from various agencies previously hinted at the possibility of layoffs, as indicated in court documents. However, a federal judge has decided to expand the initial prohibition on the layoffs.

data.title: Trump imposes 25% tariffs on imported trucks, 10% on buses starting Nov. 1. Exemptions for auto parts extended.
data.description: Starting on November 1, a 25 percent tariff will be imposed on imported light and heavy trucks, while buses will face a 10 percent tariff. However, President Trump has decided to extend tariff exemptions for auto parts.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. updates disclosure info in management circular for special meeting, TSX: KEI, NASDAQ: KGEI.
data.description: In Thousand Oaks, California, Kolibri Global Energy Inc. (referred to as "Kolibri") has announced updates regarding details included in the management information circular filed on October 15, 2025. The circular pertains to a special meeting for shareholders prompted by a requisition from TFG Asset Management UK LLP. The meeting, scheduled to vote on specific matters, involves shareholders of Kolibri. The Company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol KEI and on the NASDAQ under KGEI.

data.title: Judge expands ban on layoffs after some agencies hint at more cuts; initial order blocked 3,000 layoffs, now extended.
data.description: Authorities from various agencies had previously mentioned the potential for layoffs in legal documents, but a federal judge has now declared her intention to expand an initial restriction on the job reductions.

data.title: Canton Fair (138th edition) enhances global trade platform with upgraded services; held from Oct 15-Nov 4 in Guangzhou.
data.description: Taking place in Guangzhou from October 15 to November 4, 2025, the 138th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) is enhancing its position as a significant platform for international trade. The event offers comprehensive attendance services and facilitates full-chain trade activities to bolster global commerce.

data.title: rYojbaba Co., Ltd. partners with Koyamada International Foundation and Guardian Girls International to expand core consulting and health services business globally.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Fukuoka, Japan, rYojbaba Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: RYOJ) revealed plans to enhance its legal consulting and osteopathic clinic services worldwide. The Japanese company specializing in labor and health services is aiming for international growth through strategic corporate advancements and global partnerships. This move by rYojbaba is part of its strategy to broaden its services on a global level.
